enabled.label: Enable Continuity
enabled.help: Master switch for continuity plugin logic

bypassContinuity.label: Bypass Continuity
bypassContinuity.help: Fast bypass switch to disable continuity requests without unloading plugin

tenantId.label: Tenant ID
tenantId.help: Tenant namespace used for conversation scope and headers

apiBaseUrl.label: Anchor API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.help: Base URL for continuity-memory HTTP API

requestTimeoutMs.label: API Timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.help: Timeout for each anchor API request

conversationPrefix.label: Conversation Prefix
conversationPrefix.help: Prefix applied to OpenClaw session id when creating conversation_id

autoStartApi.label: Auto-start Anchor API
autoStartApi.help: Start continuity anchor API process from plugin service

apiCommand.label: API Command
apiCommand.help: Command used to start continuity API when autoStartApi=true

healthPath.label: Health Path
healthPath.help: API health endpoint path used for startup probe

startupProbeAttempts.label: Startup Probe Attempts
startupProbeAttempts.help: How many health checks before plugin opens bypass

circuitBreakerFailureThreshold.label: Circuit Breaker Failures
circuitBreakerFailureThreshold.help: Consecutive failures before continuity calls are temporarily bypassed
